name: @types/which
usage_summary: which is imported directly in 6 source files: system.ts and system.test.ts in cli-kit, version.ts and version.test.ts in cli-kit, and mkcert.ts and mkcert.test.ts in app. which@4.0.0 does not ship its own .d.ts files (confirmed via pnpm store), so @types/which provides the necessary type declarations.
how_to_remove: Not a removal candidate while which is in use. If which is replaced with a typed alternative, remove @types/which from both app and cli-kit devDependencies.
replacement_reason: which is actively used across app and cli-kit and does not bundle its own types. @types/which must be retained in both packages.
